category_sources: source_facts.description says in-memory geolocation data store, spatial index, and realtime geofence; official site describes Tile38 as a geospatial database and geofencing server.
display_name_sources: Official homepage https://tile38.com/ uses the project name Tile38.
docs_sources: Official Tile38 site provides Commands documentation and links docs topics such as Getting Started, Geofences, and Commands.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/tidwall/tile38; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies geolocation data store, spatial index, and realtime geofence; source_facts.executables lists server and CLI.
